topic: The same passenger boards my bus every day and steps off one pace behind me.
title: The Passenger Who Got Off One Step Behind Me | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The same passenger boards my bus every day and steps off one pace behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: Interior of a dim city bus at dusk, empty seats, one shadowed figure seated at the back, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I take the same route home every evening after work.
scenes.image_prompt: A city bus pulling up to a stop in fading light, windows glowing, wet street reflecting, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same seat, same window, same gray streets sliding by.
scenes.image_prompt: View through a rain-streaked bus window of grey streets at dusk, faint reflection of the cabin, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I first noticed them because they boarded at no real stop.
scenes.image_prompt: A bus door open on an empty roadside with no stop sign, dim streetlight, deep shadow beyond, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They sat behind me. They got off when I got off.
scenes.image_prompt: Bus interior aisle seen from front, a single dark silhouette seated mid-cabin, fluorescent flicker, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Always one pace back. Always matching my steps exactly.
scenes.image_prompt: A sidewalk at night seen from above, one figure walking with a second shadow trailing close behind, streetlight glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I changed routes, changed times, changed buses entirely.
scenes.image_prompt: A different bus stop at night with a new route sign, empty bench, dim amber streetlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: They were already aboard each one, seated, waiting, behind my seat.
scenes.image_prompt: Back of a bus seat with a shadowy figure just visible in the row behind, dim cabin light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I asked the driver. He said only I had boarded all week.
scenes.image_prompt: A bus driver silhouette from behind at the wheel, empty mirror reflection, dim dashboard glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At my stop I spun around fast. The seat was empty, still warm.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty bus seat in close detail, fabric faintly pressed, weak overhead light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked home alone, counting footsteps. Mine, and one more.
scenes.image_prompt: A lone figure walking a dark empty street, long shadow stretching ahead, sparse streetlights, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My doorbell footage shows two of us arriving. Both with my face.
scenes.image_prompt: Grainy doorbell camera still of a porch at night, a figure at the door and a second just behind, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
